caption: An older man with gray hair and a black shirt is positioned in front of a plain, light-colored wall. He wears a small earpiece in his right ear. In the background, a small blue object rests on a surface to the right. The text "Tiger-TV" appears at the top center of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, with his mouth opening and closing and his facial expressions shifting slightly. He maintains a relatively steady position throughout the clip, though his head tilts and rotates subtly as he talks. The lighting remains consistent, and the setting does not change, focusing entirely on the man's upper body and his verbal delivery.
